raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'clean this up' mean sentence-level writing polish only (Option A), or does it also include structural reorganization and logical consistency checks (Option B)?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on improving the draft's grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing for the task.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to cleaning up the text but nice-to-have to maintain research integrity in descriptions of methodology and benchmarks.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a central expected responsibility when cleaning research writing to ensure claims about correlations and procedures are accurately stated without exaggeration.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is peripheral, ensuring the cleaned text stays within the described evaluation methodology without expanding unduly.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, considering potential misuse of the evaluator model but not directly implicated in the cleaning task.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral, as the text already mentions sources, but cleaning could enhance clarity on origins of models and data."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean sentence-level writing polish only (Option A), or does it also include structural reorganization and logical consistency checks (Option B)?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on improving the draft's grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing for the task.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to cleaning up the text but nice-to-have to maintain research integrity in descriptions of methodology and benchmarks.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a central expected responsibility when cleaning research writing to ensure claims about correlations and procedures are accurately stated without exaggeration.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is peripheral, ensuring the cleaned text stays within the described evaluation methodology without expanding unduly.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, considering potential misuse of the evaluator model but not directly implicated in the cleaning task.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral, as the text already mentions sources, but cleaning could enhance clarity on origins of models and data.
